name: Le Mare Gold Corp.
summary: Le Mare Gold Corp., a resource exploration company, acquires and explores for mineral properties in Canada. It has an option to acquire a 100% interest in Brussels Creek property comprises 17 claims covering 1350.43 hectares located in the Kamloops Mining District, British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Southern Lithium Corp. and changed its name to Le Mare Gold Corp. in February 2018. Le Mare Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2010 and is based in North Vancouver, Canada.
